profile.subtitle: Web Developer
profile.aboutTextPart2: a passionate web developer with great dedication. My goal has always been to combine creativity with technology to solve real problems and offer effective solutions in both frontend and backend, which allows me to approach projects from an integrated perspective and provide complete solutions.
profile.description: I am a developer passionate about creating modern and functional applications, with experience in both frontend and backend technologies.
